profiles.label: Mon Timbre en ligne domestic
profiles.description: MTEL stamp label for France and Outre-mer
profiles.scope_notes: Nominal Avery L7159 label 63.5×33.9 mm; registered MTEL uses same stamp size (no separate profile until measured) plus paper liasse

profiles.label: Mon Timbre en ligne international
profiles.description: MTEL stamp label for international destinations
profiles.scope_notes: Same label dimensions as domestic; international registered MTEL discontinued online
